description: A newly admitted international student needs the university to issue an I-20 form, which is required to apply for a student visa.

nodes.task_description: Verify the student's admission and that they have paid their enrollment deposit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the student is admitted and has committed.

nodes.task_description: Check that the student has submitted the required financial documentation proving they can cover costs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the financial documents are on file and sufficient.

nodes.task_description: Generate the I-20 form in the SEVIS system and send it to the student.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates and sends the official document.
